notes.body: Food Safety Focus — Cyclosporiasis: cover produce washing + veggie wash solution in shift meetings, sanitize utensils/surfaces/dining/restrooms, keep Freestyle machines wiped, frequent hand-washing + glove changes, follow the food-safety checklist incl. temp checks and effective sanitizer. Also: catch up the Daily Report (opener or closer to complete) and reply who owns it. Possible 2-hr bread delivery delay — check stock, hold a 1-day buffer.

Lettuce/veggie wash: make sure your veggie wash is testing correctly and RESPOND — response requested. Cyclospora: check veggie wash regularly, review Corporate communications, and PRINT + POST all Corporate communications on the board. 'As leaders, we are always on stage.'
Upload the missing 2065 deposit receipt for 7/10 to the portal.

7/14 net sales $3,551.84 (145 orders / 678 guests / $24.50 avg). Labor 28.04% — over the 25% ceiling. COGS Flash (wk ending 7/19, early): CP% 22.1. Open CT tasks: VO-Rec-BOSS Alpha Ohio Valley 7/13, L-Rev 7/13, L-Rev 7/14, VO-Rec-Performance Fdsvce 7/14 — close today.
Tuesday 7/14: 2 missed — Closing Checklist + PM Pre-Shift Check, owner Anthony Pirtle (PM). AM Vicki Lucey clean. Close the loop tonight.
Open ticket — 'probe connected but not taking reading' (no update). Check the sensor is reporting.
